commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the gateway operator approval runtime token helper to prefer the shared exec-approvals socket token, while keeping a stable process-local random fallback and adding focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +102. Total +112 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, though I did not run a live repro in this read-only review. Current main uses a process-local random runtime token while the gateway trusts only that token during approval-runtime handshakes, so separate approval runtimes cannot share it reliably.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is appropriate because I found no concrete code defect to patch; the blockers are contributor proof and maintainer acceptance of the auth-boundary change.

target.title: fix: share operator approval runtime token
target.body:
## Summary
- read the operator approval runtime token from the shared exec approvals socket config when available
- keep the process-local random token as a fallback when no shared socket token exists
- add regression coverage for shared-token selection, late token availability, and fallback stability

## Validation
- `PATH="/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH" pnpm exec vitest run src/gateway/operator-approval-runtime-token.test.ts src/gateway/operator-approvals-client.test.ts src/gateway/message-handler.post-connect-health.test.ts`
- `PATH="/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH" pnpm exec vitest run src/agents/tools/gateway.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/exec-approvals.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/provider.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/gateway/operator-approval-runtime-token.ts src/gateway/operator-approval-runtime-token.test.ts`
- Live Discord proof on the Spartacus gateway after loading the bundled Discord plugin: fresh channel approval card and fresh DM-only approval card both resolved with `decision: "allow-once"`.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
